description.en: Resolution turned first-order theorem proving into a uniform refutation procedure: translate statements into clauses, negate the target, and derive a contradiction. Robinson combined resolution with unification, giving automated provers a compact rule that could be implemented systematically. It became a foundation for logic programming, SAT/SMT lineage, and many later reasoning systems.
description.zh: 归结方法把一阶定理证明变成统一的反驳过程：把命题转为子句，否定目标，再推出矛盾。Robinson 将归结与合一结合起来，让自动证明器获得一种可系统实现的紧凑规则。它后来成为逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系以及许多推理系统的基础。

html.en: Earlier theorem provers often needed many specialized inference rules. Resolution reduced proof search to a small number of clause operations, making mechanized logic less ad hoc.
html.zh: 早期定理证明器往往依赖许多专门推理规则。归结把证明搜索压缩为少量子句操作，让机械化逻辑不再那么临时拼装。

html.en: The key move is refutation: assume the claim is false, then repeatedly resolve complementary literals until the empty clause appears.
html.zh: 关键动作是反驳：先假设结论为假，再不断归结互补文字，直到推出空子句。

html.en: Experts generally treat resolution as a foundational proof method for symbolic AI and automated reasoning. Its long-term legacy is visible in theorem proving, logic programming, SAT/SMT lineages, and constraint-based reasoning systems.
html.zh: 专家通常把归结法视为符号 AI 和自动推理的基础证明方法。它的长期影响体现在定理证明、逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系和基于约束的推理系统中。

material.en: Journal of the ACM paper and theorem-proving histories
material.zh: 《ACM 杂志》 论文与自动证明史料

demo.zh: 不断归结子句直到出现矛盾

text.en: Statements are converted into disjunctions of literals so one inference rule can operate repeatedly.
text.zh: 命题被转成文字析取子句，使同一条推理规则可以反复作用。

text.en: Variables are matched by substitutions, allowing one rule to handle many concrete formulas.
text.zh: 变量通过替换匹配，让一条规则能处理大量具体公式。

text.en: Deriving the empty clause means the negated goal is inconsistent with the premises.
text.zh: 推出空子句意味着否定目标与前提不相容。

description.en: Canonical source for resolution; local diagrams redraw clause operations and refutation flow.
description.zh: 归结方法的经典来源；本地图重画子句操作和反驳流程。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

label.en: A Machine-Oriented Logic Based on the Resolution Principle
label.zh: 基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑
